scripts.build:publish:packages: node ./scripts/build-package.mjs runtime core tooling postgres host deno node rest-collections
scripts.ci:check: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run publish:dry-run
scripts.publish:dry-run: bun run build:publish:packages && (cd packages/runtime && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/core && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/tooling && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/postgres && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/host && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/deno && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/node && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/rest-collections && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/bun && bun publish --dry-run --frozen-lockfile)
scripts.release:publish: bun run build:publish:packages && (cd packages/runtime && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/core && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/tooling && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/postgres && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/host && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/deno && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/node && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/rest-collections && bun publish --frozen-lockfile) && (cd packages/bun && bun publish --frozen-lockfile)
